nl_query: How many boards have a board-level policy overriding the course-level policy?
failed_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ep.board_id) AS board_policy_override_count
FROM   evaluation_policy ep
WHERE  ep.scope_type = 'BOARD'
  AND  ep.is_active = TRUE;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): evaluation_policy.is_active, evaluation_policy.scope_type. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
